items.name: Deluxe Vine Staff
items.description: Call forth a circle of vines from the earth.  If your foes hit them they will do 20 damage.

items.name: Bo Staff
items.description: Unleash the flaming fury within with this spinning bo staff.  The final blow has an extra firey kick!

items.name: Military Dress Sword
items.description: Sword of honor, sword of might, strike the right foe tonight.  This sword slashes and lunges.  For a special attack press 'W' twice before striking.

items.name: Latke
items.description: Pass the apple sauce plz....

items.name: Nightfall Elixir
items.description: It's that time of the day when the sun goes down.

items.name: Green Gremlins Paintball Gun
items.description: Go green with this awesome paintball gun!

items.name: Riot Shield and Billy Club Set
items.description: Rioters getting out of control? We'll put a stop to that!

items.name: Penguin Shooter
items.description: Left click to fire a baby penguin from the launcher. The baby penguin will jump around, dealing up to 10 damage each second for 10 seconds. You can have 15 baby penguins running around at a time for a full on penguin swarm!

items.name: Laser Electrocutor
items.description: Don't laser electrocute me bro!

items.name: Incinerator 6000
items.description: Why 6000?  Because it shoots fireballs that are a solid 6000 degrees of burning power.  Hold the mouse to charge your shot for maximum fire power!  This fire will damage any player it touches - doing 70 damage over 5 seconds.

items.name: Deluxe Slime Ray
items.description: He slimed me! A rapid fire slime gun; can fire quickly with a short reload time. Shoot projectiles of slime at your opponents which do 8 damage upon striking them and obscure their screen in slime temporarily!

items.name: Evil Green Science Goo
items.description: This goo will stop your foes in their tracks!  Hit your friends or foes with this stuff and they'll lose their ability to jump and slowly lose the ability to move. Eventually the evil green goo will take them over and they will become this goo. Your target will be no more.

items.name: Quill of the President
items.description: Use this to write out your presidential decree!

items.name: Giant Dinosaur Feet
items.description: Stomp around ROBLOX in these giant dino feet! Every step you take will do 10 damage to nearby foes and knock them back. If you manage to jump on someone's head while wearing these prehistoric bad boys, you'll stomp them until their health is gone.

items.name: Sword of Fiery Justice
items.description: Use this sword for regular slash damage or send out fiery justice one flaming ball at a time.

items.name: ROBLOX Frisbee
items.description: Whether you play Ultimate or old school - this is the frisbee for you!

items.name: Make It Rain
items.description: Making it rain has never been so easy!  Throw money around like it ain't no thang.  People near you when you make it rain will follow you around to pick money up.

items.name: Fusion Gatling Blaster
items.description: This gun has two modes; rapid-fire lasers, and a flamethrower attachment. You can alternate between the two by hitting the 'Q' key.  For the laser shots, you click and hold, and the upper barrel slowly begin to spin with a Gatling-fire like sound effect. It gets faster and louder, shooting projectiles more rapidly until it's at its maximum speed. This is rapid-fire, so there's dozens of lasers hitting your enemies all at once. They each do 8 damage.  The flamethrower, you click and hold as well, which a moderate sized flame blows out from the under-barrel of the gun.

items.name: Flute
items.description: Time to go out enjoy the breeze  and play some soothing music! Watch as you play the flute, nearby Robloxians dancing to your tune!

items.name: Valentine’s Throwing Stars
items.description: Throw deadly love at your enemies!
